I'll then read the updated file and add get_image_mimetype() as a small additive method, updating image_to_base64 to call it for mimetype resolution (minimal touch to your logic). I will NOT edit until I receive your DONE. Reply ACCEPT if agreeable, or REVISE if you'd rather go second.

I won't touch ImageBlock otherwise or add new methods to it, so your get_image_mimetype() method can be added without conflict. Accepting shared-file split.
